title: Crosshair Heart Ms
description: A simple texture pack to make your crosshair a heart.
body:
**Summary**

Custom crosshair made for use in my _**_SSG modpack_**_ (_Coming soon_). Now released to the public.

**Description**

This will further enhance your vanilla experience by changing the default vanilla crosshair to a heart shaped crosshair, making the game more cute and enjoyable.

Looking for more crosshairs, resource packs? I'll be making more crosshairs and Resource Packs soon, and feel free to send me any suggestions.

![As the name suggests, it's just a simple heart crosshair, and it's compatible with all versions.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f66250b414819567f9423da8ccdb0f8ad8fea14.jpeg)
